title: [Non-Record] JEPA Baseline — LLM-JEPA pretraining  — 1.2699 bpb
author: IshiPareek

data.description: Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture for language model pretraining; predicts embeddings instead of tokens using context and target encoders.
Target encoder is an EMA copy of the context encoder with no gradients.

novel_contributions: JEPA-based language model pretraining from scratch
Dual-encoder setup with a gradient-trained context encoder and EMA target encoder
